author: Strict
text:
Add advisory min_bl_version config field

New optional top-level config.min_bl_version (SPEC §5/§10). A bl that knows the field warns on config load when its build is below the configured floor; older clients drop the unknown field structurally (no deny_unknown_fields). This is the documented, non-engineered mitigation for the one accepted BC caveat: an old bl local-squashing a deferred-mode bl review (epic bl-00ca, 2026-05-10).

Version compare lives in a new min_version module: a pure advisory() core (every branch unit-testable without capturing stderr) plus a thin warn_if_below() stderr wrapper Config::load calls after a successful parse. No semver crate; bl versions are plain MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH and a three-int compare with operator shorthand suffices, malformed floors warn the advisory is ignored.

Decomposed config_tests.rs: lifted the SPEC §5 schema-additions tests into sibling config_schema_tests.rs so both stay under the 300-line cap. README/SKILL prose stays with docs ball bl-5305.
